---
title: "Figure 2"
author: "Luciano Moffatt"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

theme_set(theme_minimal(base_size = 12))
algo_colors <- c(MRV = "#b24d22", IRV = "#0f6c7a")
```

```{r load-data}
files <- tibble(
  filename = c(
    "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_analysis_MRV",
    "data/figure_2_dlikelihood_analysis_IRV"
  ),
  algo = c("MRV", "IRV"),
  scheme = c("scheme_CO", "scheme_CO")
)

load_parameter_metadata <- function(scheme) {
  readr::read_csv(
    file.path("..", "data", "models", paste0(scheme, "_par.csv")),
    show_col_types = FALSE
  ) |>
    transmute(
      scheme = scheme,
      param_index = i_par,
      base_param = parameter_name,
      parameter_transformation = parameter_transformation,
      transformed_value = transformed_mean,
      transformed_axis = case_when(
        parameter_transformation == "Log10" ~ paste0("log10(", parameter_name, ")"),
        TRUE ~ parameter_name
      ),
      param_plot = paste0(
        transformed_axis,
        "\n",
        "theta = ",
        sprintf("%.2f", transformed_mean)
      )
    )
}

normalize_component <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Information_Distortion_Matrix$") ~
      "Information_Distortion_Matrix",
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Information_Distortion_Reconstituted$") ~
      "Information_Distortion_Reconstituted",
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Sample_Distortion_Matrix$|\\.Sample_Distortion_Matrix$") ~
      "Sample_Distortion_Matrix",
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Correlation_Distortion_Matrix$") ~
      "Correlation_Distortion_Matrix",
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Distortion_Corrected_Covariance$") ~
      "Distortion_Corrected_Covariance",
    str_detect(x, "(^Probit_statistics_)?Distortion_Induced_Bias$|\\.Distortion_Induced_Bias$") ~
      "Distortion_Induced_Bias",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

band_role <- function(probit, quantile_level) {
  case_when(
    probit == "mean" ~ "mean",
    !is.na(quantile_level) & abs(quantile_level - 0.025) < 1e-9 ~ "lower",
    !is.na(quantile_level) & abs(quantile_level - 0.975) < 1e-9 ~ "upper",
    TRUE ~ NA_character_
  )
}

extract_band <- function(df) {
  df |>
    mutate(band = band_role(probit, quantile_level)) |>
    filter(!is.na(band)) |>
    summarise(
      value = dplyr::first(value),
      .by = c(
        algo, scheme, component, time_index, param_index, param,
        transformed_axis, transformed_value, param_plot, band
      )
    ) |>
    pivot_wider(names_from = band, values_from = value) |>
    drop_na(mean, lower, upper)
}

parameter_metadata <- purrr::map_dfr(unique(files$scheme), load_parameter_metadata)
param_levels <- parameter_metadata |>
  arrange(transformed_value, param_index) |>
  pull(param_plot)

d <- purrr::pmap_dfr(files, function(filename, algo, scheme) {
  readr::read_csv(paste0(filename, ".csv"), show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    mutate(algo = algo, scheme = scheme)
}) |>
  mutate(
    component = normalize_component(component_path),
    param_index = suppressWarnings(as.integer(value_row)),
    time_index = sample_index + 1,
    param = coalesce(param_name, if_else(!is.na(value_row), paste0("param_", value_row), NA_character_))
  ) |>
  left_join(parameter_metadata, by = c("scheme", "param_index")) |>
  mutate(
    param = coalesce(base_param, param),
    transformed_axis = coalesce(transformed_axis, param),
    param_plot = factor(coalesce(param_plot, param), levels = unique(param_levels))
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(component))

stopifnot(nrow(d) > 0)
```

```{r build-panels}
dib_time <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "evolution",
    component == "Distortion_Induced_Bias",
    is.na(value_col)
  ) |>
  extract_band()

sdm_time <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "evolution",
    component == "Sample_Distortion_Matrix",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

sdm_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Sample_Distortion_Matrix",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

dib_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Distortion_Induced_Bias",
    is.na(value_col)
  ) |>
  extract_band()

idm_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Information_Distortion_Matrix",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

idr_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Information_Distortion_Reconstituted",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

corr_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Correlation_Distortion_Matrix",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

dcc_total <- d |>
  filter(
    scope == "summary",
    component == "Distortion_Corrected_Covariance",
    !is.na(value_col),
    value_row == value_col
  ) |>
  extract_band()

fmt_interval <- function(mean, lower, upper) {
  sprintf("%.3f [%.3f, %.3f]", mean, lower, upper)
}

global_dib_table <- dib_total |>
  transmute(
    Algorithm = algo,
    Parameter = transformed_axis,
    theta_log10 = round(transformed_value, 3),
    `Global DIB [2.5%, 97.5%]` = fmt_interval(mean, lower, upper)
  ) |>
  arrange(theta_log10, Parameter, Algorithm)

global_matrix_table <- bind_rows(
  idm_total |> mutate(diagnostic = "diag(C_total)"),
  idr_total |> mutate(diagnostic = "diag(C_reconstituted)"),
  sdm_total |> mutate(diagnostic = "diag(C_sample)"),
  corr_total |> mutate(diagnostic = "diag(R)"),
  dcc_total |> mutate(diagnostic = "diag(Sigma_DCC)")
) |>
  transmute(
    Algorithm = algo,
    Parameter = transformed_axis,
    theta_log10 = round(transformed_value, 3),
    diagnostic,
    interval = fmt_interval(mean, lower, upper)
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = diagnostic, values_from = interval) |>
  arrange(theta_log10, Parameter, Algorithm)

stopifnot(
  nrow(dib_time) > 0,
  nrow(sdm_time) > 0,
  nrow(dib_total) > 0,
  nrow(idm_total) > 0
)

p_dib_time <- ggplot(dib_time, aes(time_index, mean, color = algo, fill = algo)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey45") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.16, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~param_plot, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Distortion-induced bias by step",
    x = "Step index",
    y = "DIB in transformed coordinates"
  )

p_sdm_time <- ggplot(sdm_time, aes(time_index, mean, color = algo, fill = algo)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey45") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), alpha = 0.16, linewidth = 0) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~param_plot, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "B. Sample-distortion diagonal by step",
    x = "Step index",
    y = "diag(C_sample) in transformed coordinates"
  )

dodge_width <- 0.45

p_dib_total <- ggplot(
  dib_total,
  aes(param_plot, mean, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = algo)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey45") +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), linewidth = 0.4) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "C1. Total DIB",
    x = NULL,
    y = "DIB"
  )

p_idm_total <- ggplot(
  idm_total,
  aes(param_plot, mean, ymin = lower, ymax = upper, color = algo)
) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3, color = "grey45") +
  geom_pointrange(position = position_dodge(width = dodge_width), linewidth = 0.4) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_color_manual(values = algo_colors) +
  labs(
    title = "C2. Total distortion diagonal",
    x = NULL,
    y = "diag(C)"
  )
```

```{r global-tables}
knitr::kable(
  global_dib_table,
  caption = "Global distortion-induced bias in transformed parameter coordinates."
)

knitr::kable(
  global_matrix_table,
  caption = "Global diagonal distortion diagnostics in transformed parameter coordinates."
)
```

```{r plot-figure, fig.height=12, fig.width=8}
(p_dib_time / p_sdm_time / (p_dib_total | p_idm_total)) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "Figure 2. Information distortion diagnostics for MRV and IRV",
    subtitle = "Per-step DIB and sample distortion, plus global DIB and total information distortion."
  )
```
